question: Which of the following is necessary as part of the procedures for reporting any incident or accident relating to the UA to CAAS or the relevant authority?

options.text: Initial notification within 24 hours of occurrence and a follow-up report within 3 working days.
Casualties and damaged property involved, details and state of UA used.
Initial analysis of the cause of the incident / accident and immediate action taken after the incident / accident.

classification_notes: Incident reporting procedure is part of ANR-101 operational provisions.
